_doc: Every <button>, [role="button"], and <a role="button"> in app/templates/ must
either carry one of `allowed_primitive_classes` OR match one of `exceptions[].selector`.
The primitive set includes structural controls such as app buttons, nav rows, dropdown items,
form/control rows, HUD action cells, keyboard keys, and mobile gesture handles.
Keep `exceptions` empty unless a surface has a documented structural reason to opt out.
